channel.title: MI A2 on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in MI A2 on Tech Tracker

item.title: How to unlock bootloader of MI A2 and MI A2 lite without PC.
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-obRyn-0H-vc/YeMOJHTpzyI/AAAAAAAAIiY/Jo7weioaDQAKTSBx7yPDms6AjNnMuhkGACNcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1642270239650883-0.png" alt=""> Xiaomi worked with Google on Android one smartphones to provide stock android software experience to it’s customers who like and preffer stock andriod over MIUI, how ever to be honest MI A2 and MI A2 lite has alot of bugs and issues which still didn’t fixed by Google and Xiaomi, this is why you may experience random reboots, boot takes few minutes, sudden jams etc which leads to poor user experience.
